narrative:
Precinct Sylvania Township Q (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,109 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.6 percentage points.
